acceptance_criteria: docs/compat.md GoToSocial row shows all applicable checkmarks; signed GETs are accepted by GTS; GTS posts federate correctly; follow/follow-back works; GTS rejects unsigned fetches and our signed fetches succeed
description: Test and fix compatibility with GoToSocial. GoToSocial requires signed fetches by default (authorized_fetch=true must be working). Test full compat matrix.
design: GTS is the strictest about authorized fetch. Ensure all outbound GETs are signed. Test against a live GTS instance. GTS also implements some FEPs that we don't — ensure we don't 500 on unknown activity types.
title: GoToSocial compatibility testing and bug fixes
